title: Some recent results in Ramsey theory
abstract: The purpose of this survey is to provide a gentle introduction to several recent breakthroughs in graph Ramsey theory. In particular, we will outline the proofs (due to various groups of authors) of exponential improvements to the diagonal, near-diagonal, and multicolour Ramsey numbers, improved lower bounds on $R(3,k)$ and $R(4,k)$, and an exponential upper bound on the induced Ramsey numbers.
